name: codex-science
description: Audited scientific skills, public-source tools, reproducible artifacts, and evidence review for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run reproducible scientific research in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Coordinate scientific work with an audited multi-source skill catalog, replayable public data, executable quantitative research, reproducible computation, structured provenance, and independent evidence review.
defaultPrompt: Start Codex Science and investigate this question with an auditable research plan.
Start Codex Science and solve this quantitative problem with explicit assumptions and verification.
Start Codex Science and review this result against its code and evidence.
